message:
feat(demo): implement editor panel with syntax highlighting (bd-2tj)

Update draw_editor_panel to display actual file content:
- Header bar with file name and language indicator
- Line numbers in gutter with dimmed style
- Basic syntax highlighting for Rust (keywords, comments, strings)
- Basic syntax highlighting for Markdown (headings, code blocks, lists)
- Focus border indicator when editor is focused
- Truncation with ellipsis for long lines

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
